---
title: "Proposal"
---

::: {.page-intro}
[Project planning]{.muted-label}

Use this page for the main proposal narrative. Keep it focused on the project purpose, what you plan to deliver, and why the work matters.
:::

::: {.content-grid}
::: {.section-card}
## Problem Statement

Describe the issue or question the project is solving. State the context clearly and explain why it is worth investigating.
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Objectives

- Define the main project goal
- List the specific questions you want to answer
- Clarify what a successful result looks like
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Scope

Explain what is included in the project and what is intentionally excluded. This helps keep the work realistic and measurable.
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Expected Outcome

Summarize the deliverables you expect at the end of the project, such as dashboards, insights, or presentation materials.
:::
:::
